question:
Jompuses are dull. Each jompus is a rompus. Each rompus is nervous. Rompuses are dumpuses. Every dumpus is kind. Dumpuses are wumpuses. Tumpuses are not opaque. Each wumpus is bitter. Each wumpus is a zumpus. Every zumpus is fruity. Zumpuses are impuses. Impuses are wooden. Each impus is a yumpus. Every yumpus is opaque. Every yumpus is a vumpus. Every vumpus is small. Vumpuses are numpuses. Sam is a dumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sam is not opaque.
